description: Initial demo recordings - platform bootstrap with Identity, OAuth, and core services

recordings.title: Platform Overview
recordings.description: Full walkthrough of the Zorbit unified console: Dashboard, Users, Organizations, Roles, Customers, Navigation, Messaging, Audit, PII Vault, API Docs, Settings, Demo

recordings.title: Identity & Auth Flow
recordings.description: Complete OAuth flow: Settings (user profile) → Logout → Login page with Google/GitHub/LinkedIn → Google account chooser → Dashboard (logged in)

recordings.title: API Documentation
recordings.description: API Documentation page showing all 7 Zorbit platform services with Swagger links: Identity, Authorization, Navigation, Messaging, PII Vault, Audit, Customer

recordings.title: Audit & Compliance
recordings.description: Audit Logs with filters (event type, actor, resource, date range), PII Vault audit view with tokenization notice, Demo page with seed/delete controls
